パッケージ mechanics.rl

package mechanics.rl
  • 関連パッケージ
    パッケージ
    説明
    mechanics.rl.bridge
     
  • クラス
    説明
    ActionResult
    Result of one environment step.
    ActionSpace
    Discrete action space and validity masking for RL.
    BattleEnvironment
    Teacher-free RL environment backed by CombatSimulator.
    BattleEnvironment.ResetResult
    Reset return values.
    BattleEnvironment.TimingSnapshot
     
    CapabilityProfiler
    Derives capability scores for each character in a party by running controlled simulation experiments.
    CapabilityProfiler.TemplateRun
     
    EpisodeConfig
    Runtime configuration for one RL episode.
    FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory
    Creates the fixed FlinsParty2 simulator used by Java-native RL.
    FlinsParty2RLSimulatorFactory.CachedBuild
     
    MultiPartyRLSimulatorFactory
    Samples uniformly from multiple party simulators for RL training.
    ObservationEncoder
    Encodes simulator state into a fixed-size observation vector.
    ObservationEncoder.CapabilityProfileStore
    Loads and caches character capability profiles from a JSON file.
    PolicyInference
    Policy outputs for one environment slot.
    QuietExecution
    Small helper to mute stdout during high-throughput rollout execution.
    RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory
    Creates the fixed Raiden/Xingqiu/Xiangling/Bennett simulator used by multi-party RL.
    RaidenPartyRLSimulatorFactory.CachedBuild
     
    RecurrentState
    Mutable recurrent hidden state.
    RewardFunction
    Computes the reward for one transition.
    RLAction
    Fixed Java-native RL action space.
    RLEpisodeFactory
    Creates simulator episodes together with the party-specific metadata required by RL.
    RLEpisodeFactory.EpisodeContext
    One fully specified episode instance.
    RLPartyRegistry
    Central registry for RL-available party variants.
    RLPartySpec
    Declarative description of one RL-usable party variant.
    SinglePartyRLEpisodeFactory
    Adapts one fixed simulator supplier into an RLEpisodeFactory.
